snippet: If a school site has been damaged in an incident or event that occurred within the boundaries of the school’s site and where that damage presents an immediate health and safety concern for students, staff and/or the community, any school staff member can call the Make-safe provider on 1300 133 468 . The Victorian School Building Authorities (VSBA) Make-safe Program assists schools that have sustained damage through an incident or event that occurred within the boundaries of the school’s site, where that damage presents an immediate health and safety concern for students, staff and/or the community. These guidelines are also applicable to severe incidents of malicious activity, such as vandalism or break-ins.
